S.FORM: Gary Bergen sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1933, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 7, Gary Bergen, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2010) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: …£arj ő≤er…£en s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, …£arj ő≤er…£en, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
